description: LATENT BUG: do_planetbids_scan (scan_planetbids.ex hits /portal/{id}/bo/bo-search, Floki-parses) gets WAF-blocked/empty against modern PlanetBids -> 0 bids; only the browser fallback works. PlanetBids is Ember.js: WAF passes with Chrome UA but data loads from a papi API namespace behind OAuth token-exchange (endpoint in a lazy-loaded chunk). Decide: (a) browser (pragmatic, works today), or (b) reverse-engineer papi + OAuth (robust but fragile/high-effort). Either fix or explicitly retire the dead HTTP scanner.
title: PlanetBids coverage: fix dead HTTP path; decide browser vs papi API
